description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained grassy yard and several large, leafy trees. The house features a flat roof and a mix of beige and light-colored exterior walls, with multiple large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entryway is accessible via a paved walkway, flanked by trees and leading to a modest, covered porch area. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the roof appears to have a skylight or open section in the center. The property includes a driveway and is bordered by neatly trimmed grass, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on open, accessible spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a grassy yard surrounded by trees. The exterior is light-colored and features a paved walkway leading to a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and two prominent trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, additional trees, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more windows, and the open yard area.
description_view_3: Angled view from above, emphasizing the flat roof, skylight, and the distribution of trees around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple covered entryway with a paved walkway, no steps, and minimal decorative elements
